title: Redesign Semantic Model & DAX Measures
description: Implement robust DAX measures library (40+ measures designed) to answer business questions effectively. Design phase complete with comprehensive measure library.
acceptanceCriteria: All 40+ DAX measures implemented in semantic model
Measure groups created: Procurement, Time Intelligence, Sustainability, Risk, Advanced
Time intelligence working (YoY, MoM, YTD comparisons)
All 10 key business questions answerable with measures
Measures documented with business logic in dax_measure_library.md
dependencies: Power BI Desktop access for implementation
notes: Design phase COMPLETE - 40+ measures designed across 5 categories
Waiting for Erik to sync to Fabric and verify measures work
Focus on measures that showcase technical sophistication for portfolio
Use variables in DAX for performance and readability

task_verification.notes: Pre-migration task — verification predates current schema.

subtasks.title: Setup: Create _Measures table and display folders
Implement 10 Core Procurement Measures
subtasks.details: Total Spend EUR, Total Quantity, Avg Unit Price, Supplier Count, Material Count, Transaction Count, Active Procurement Days

subtasks.title: Implement 7 Time Intelligence Measures
subtasks.details: Total Spend LY/MTD/YTD/LYTD, YoY Growth EUR, MoM Growth %, 3M Moving Avg

subtasks.title: Implement 8 Sustainability Measures
subtasks.details: Avg EPI Score, Weighted EPI Score, Spend-Weighted EPI, % Spend by EPI Category, Avg WGI Score

subtasks.title: Implement 9 Risk Measures
subtasks.details: HHI Index, HHI Category, Max Concentration, High Risk Material Count, Composite Risk Score

subtasks.title: Implement 6 Advanced Measures
subtasks.details: Material Rank, Top 10%, Unit Price Volatility, CV, Cumulative Spend %, Is Top 80%

subtasks.title: Erik: Sync and verify measures in Fabric
subtasks.details: Synced TMDL to Fabric, verified 40+ measures appear, tested Total Spend EUR = 3,342,498

progress: COMPLETE (7/7 subtasks). 40+ measures verified working in Fabric. Total Spend EUR = 3,342,498.
